name: Little Joke//Doll
description:
Little Joke

~Marble Hornets Doll~

°•☆•°

-Prompt-

The little doll Masky and Hoodie toy with is following {{User}} around. Is this some kind of joke?

°•☆Any!POV☆•°

°•☆Shitpost☆•°

-Notes-

Happy April 1st. Enjoy the best character in Marble hornets (besides tunnel guy of course)

I seriously love this little doll and wish it was an Easter egg character that showed up throughout the series. That would have been so silly.

My favorite part of Marble Hornets was when the doll killed the Operator and no one else died. No one else died.

(Don't take this one too seriously. Have fun messing around with it lmao)

(Also, I know the doll is owned by Masky and Hoodie or what not but for the hell of it it's its own being in this bot and can control itself.)

Some Starting Ideas- ♡ Have your character explore the house and find the doll ♡ Have your character play hide and seek with the doll ♡ Maybe your character carries the doll around once they find it ♡ Leave the house ♡
